hero.description: AI-powered vulnerability detection. A conversational interface that orchestrates 317+ security tools for complete audits in hours.
hero.subtitle: AI-powered vulnerability detection infrastructure. Automated scans, real-time reports, zero false positives.

problem1.title: Prohibitive Cost
problem1.description: Professional audits cost $15,000 - $100,000+. Enterprise tools run $5,000 - $50,000/year. SMBs cannot afford adequate security.

problem2.title: Technical Complexity
problem2.description: Mastering 50+ different tools requires 2-5 years of training and expensive certifications. No unified interface available.

problem3.title: Endless Time
problem3.description: Manual audits take 2-6 weeks. Tool configuration alone requires several days. Results analysis demands deep expertise.

problem4.title: Massive False Positives
problem4.description: Industry average: 30-50% false positive rate. Teams waste hours on verification. Alert fatigue is real.

problem5.title: Fragmented Solutions
problem5.description: No unified platform. Incompatible reports. No data correlation between tools. Integration nightmare.

interface.label: INTERFACE
interface.title: AI-Driven Security
interface.description: An intuitive conversational interface that transforms natural language queries into comprehensive security audits. No technical expertise required.

investors.label: INVESTORS
investors.imageAlt: BJHUNT investment opportunity - Growing AI cybersecurity startup
investors.subtitle: The ChatGPT of Cybersecurity — Revolutionizing vulnerability detection through Artificial Intelligence
investors.title: Invest in the Future of Cybersecurity
investors.summaryText: BJHUNT is developing a SaaS platform that democratizes access to enterprise-level cybersecurity using AI. Our conversational interface enables anyone to perform comprehensive security audits without technical expertise.
investors.summaryPara1: BJHUNT is a technology startup developing a revolutionary cybersecurity platform based on conversational artificial intelligence. Our mission is to democratize access to IT security audits by enabling any user, regardless of technical expertise, to launch vulnerability analyses simply by describing their needs in natural language.
investors.summaryPara2: Like ChatGPT for text generation, BJHUNT enables businesses of all sizes to access security audit capabilities previously reserved for organizations with specialized teams and substantial budgets. Our proprietary AI model, trained on billions of cybersecurity reports, CVEs and documented exploits, orchestrates over 317 interconnected security tools to deliver comprehensive analyses with a false positive rate below 5%.
investors.summaryPara3: Since December 2023, our team of 4 co-founders has been developing and training BJHUNT. Today, we are at 70% completion with test results exceeding the performance of market-leading solutions such as Invicti and Acunetix, companies valued at several billion dollars.
investors.keyPoint7: 1h to 48h non-stop scans depending on depth
investors.problemIntro: The current cybersecurity landscape faces major systemic challenges that make protecting digital infrastructure inaccessible for most organizations. We have identified five critical problems:
investors.problem1Text: The average cost of a data breach reaches $4.88M in 2024 (IBM). SMBs cannot afford to invest in multiple tools.
investors.problem2Text: Tools require 2 to 5 years of training. Each solution has its own interface and methodology.
investors.problem3Text: 3.5M unfilled cybersecurity positions. Sector unemployment rate: 0% since 2011.
investors.problem4Text: Traditional scanners: 30-50% false positives drowning teams in irrelevant alerts.
investors.problem5Text: Organizations use 50+ different tools. No unified platform.
investors.cybercrimePara: According to Cybersecurity Ventures, cybercrime damages will reach $10.5 trillion annually by 2025. If cybercrime were a country, it would represent the third largest economy after the United States and China. Ransomware costs alone are expected to exceed $265 billion by 2031.
investors.solutionIntro: BJHUNT is an AI-powered cybersecurity platform that unifies and automates security analyses through a natural language conversational interface.
investors.step1: User describes security needs in plain language
investors.step2: AI analyzes and selects appropriate tools
investors.step4: Intelligent aggregation and deduplication of results
investors.contactText: For more information or to discuss an investment opportunity, contact our team.
investors.marketPara: The global vulnerability management market is valued at $17.55 billion in 2025 and is expected to reach $24.07 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 6.5%. Africa represents a rapidly growing market with a CAGR of 13.5%.
investors.solutionHeader: OUR SOLUTION: THE CHATGPT OF CYBERSECURITY
investors.solutionPara1: BJHUNT revolutionizes the cybersecurity approach by introducing an AI-based conversational interface. Our platform allows any user to launch complete security audits simply by describing their needs in natural language, exactly as they would interact with ChatGPT.
investors.solutionPara2: Our proprietary AI model has been trained on billions of cybersecurity reports, CVE databases, documented exploits and audit methodologies. It intelligently orchestrates over 317 open-source and proprietary security tools to provide comprehensive analyses covering the full spectrum of vulnerabilities.
investors.solutionPara3: The user simply defines the scope (domain, IP, application), audit limits and desired compliance standards via a text prompt. BJHUNT automatically generates the optimal audit strategy, executes tests in parallel, correlates results and produces a professional report compliant with OWASP Top 10, PCI-DSS and ISO 27001 standards.
investors.superiorDetectionDesc: Tests demonstrate superior detection to Invicti and Acunetix on CVE, zero-days and exploits.
investors.aiPrecisionDesc: False positive rate <5% thanks to intelligent correlation by proprietary AI model.
investors.deepScansDesc: Analyses from 1h to 48h non-stop depending on target depth and complexity.
investors.integratedComplianceDesc: Automatic reports compliant with OWASP Top 10, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001.
investors.teamIntro: BJHUNT was born from the direct observation of the constraints and limits of current cybersecurity by its founder, ATCHAHOUE Destin, an experienced cybersecurity analyst and pentester. With the advent of conversational AI and ChatGPT, the idea of creating a similar interface for cybersecurity became obvious. Since December 2023, with the help of three passionate co-founders, we have been developing this vision.
investors.founderCeoDesc: Cybersecurity Analyst, Pentester. Product vision and strategy.
investors.coFounderCtoDesc: Technical architecture, AI and machine learning.
investors.monetizationPara1: BJHUNT adopts a SaaS (Software as a Service) model with recurring monthly subscriptions. Our pricing strategy is designed to maximize accessibility while ensuring solid profitability.
investors.monetizationPara2: In addition to the web platform, we offer a complete REST API for businesses wishing to integrate BJHUNT into their CI/CD pipelines and existing security workflows. This API generates additional revenue through usage-based plans.
investors.visionPara1: Our vision is to democratize access to enterprise-level cybersecurity for all organizations, regardless of their size or budget. We believe that IT security should not be a luxury reserved for large companies with dedicated teams.
investors.visionPara2: In the medium term, we aim to become the leader in cybersecurity in Africa, a rapidly growing market with a CAGR of 13.5%. In the long term, our ambition is to expand to Europe and become a global reference in AI-assisted vulnerability detection.
investors.visionPara3: We are looking for strategic investors who share our vision of accessible, effective and democratized cybersecurity. The funds raised will be used to finalize development (30% remaining), build a sales team and accelerate our expansion in the African market.
investors.investorCallPara1: We are looking for visionary investors — business angels, seed funds, strategic investors — who share our conviction that artificial intelligence can radically transform the accessibility and effectiveness of cybersecurity.
investors.investorCallPara2: With 70% of development already completed and test results surpassing market-leading solutions, BJHUNT represents a high-potential investment opportunity in an exponentially growing market. The cost of cybercrime will reach $10.5 trillion in 2025 — businesses need accessible and effective solutions.
investors.investorCallPara3: Our unique positioning — the first cybersecurity platform with a conversational AI interface — puts us in a first-mover position in an unexplored market segment. Join us to build the future of cybersecurity.

legal.label: LEGAL
legal.title: Legal Mentions
legal.ipText: All content on this site (texts, graphics, logos, images, source code) is the exclusive property of BJHUNT or its partners and is protected by intellectual property laws.
legal.termsText: By using the BJHUNT platform, you agree to use it in accordance with applicable laws. Any use for illegal purposes, including unauthorized penetration testing, is strictly prohibited.
legal.privacyText: We collect only the data necessary for the operation of our services. Your data is never sold to third parties. For more information, contact us at privacy@bjhunt.com.
legal.dataCollectionText: We collect: contact information (name, email), usage data (anonymized), and technical logs for security purposes.
legal.cookiesText: We use strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the site. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
legal.liabilityText: BJHUNT provides its services "as is". We cannot guarantee that the platform will be uninterrupted or error-free. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the services used.
legal.contactText: For any questions regarding these legal mentions, contact us at:
legal.copyrightText: All content (texts, graphics, logos, images, software) is exclusive property of BJHUNT. Protected by international laws.
legal.trademarksText: The name "BJHUNT", the logo and associated products are registered trademarks. Use prohibited without written authorization.
legal.aiTechText: The BJHUNT model is proprietary and protected by trade secret laws. Unauthorized distribution = PROHIBITED.
legal.acceptanceText: Access to the site implies full acceptance of these terms.
legal.usageText: Legal use only. Prohibited: harming others' rights, restricting access, compromising security.
legal.warningText: Information provided "as is". No guarantee of completeness, accuracy or availability.
legal.gdprText: Access • Rectification • Deletion • Opposition — Contact us to exercise your rights.
legal.exclusionText: BJHUNT, its directors, employees and affiliates cannot be held responsible for:

apiDocs.neverShare: Never share your API key. Use environment variables.
apiDocs.webhooksDesc2: Receive real-time notifications when your scans are completed. Configure a webhook endpoint to receive results automatically.

t1.label: Web Audit
t1.user: Run a full security audit on my app before launch
t1.think: I'm deploying the Exploit agent to analyze your 847 endpoints...
t1.find1: I found a critical SQL injection on /api/users — I recommend parameterizing all SQL queries immediately.
t1.find2: Your CORS configuration is too permissive and you're missing 4 essential security headers.

t2.label: Reconnaissance
t2.user: Map the attack surface of this domain: rival.io
t2.think: The Recon agent is mapping the domain — DNS, subdomains, certificates...
t2.find1: I detected 7 subdomains, 2 with open ports and no authentication. Server runs Nginx 1.22 with TLS 1.2.
t2.find2: Warning: the admin email is visible in the homepage metadata — targeted phishing risk.
t2.result: ✓ Full mapping complete · Zero false positives

t3.label: Incident Response
t3.user: We had a suspicious login at 3:14am this morning
t3.think: I'm analyzing the last 72 hours of logs with the Analyst agent...
t3.find1: IP 185.220.101.47 is a TOR exit node. It attempted 248 SSH brute-force connections on your port 22.
t3.find2: I'm blocking this IP immediately and setting up an alert for any similar activity.
t3.result: ✓ IP blocked · Alert configured · Logs archived

t4.label: Board Report
t4.user: Prepare the security report for our investor meeting
t4.think: I'm compiling the last 30 days of security data...
t4.find1: Your security score is excellent: 94/100, up 12 points this month. All critical vulnerabilities are patched.
t4.find2: You're compliant with ISO 27001, PCI-DSS and OWASP Top 10 — a strong signal for investors.
t4.result: ✓ Executive PDF report generated · Ready to share

t5.label: Pre-production
t5.user: Test my entire infrastructure before tomorrow's push
t5.think: The Cloud Hunter agent is scanning your 12 services and 4 Docker containers...
t5.find1: Ports 8080 and 3000 are publicly exposed and your SSL certificate expires in 18 days — renew before deployment.
t5.find2: I found a secret API key in your environment variables. It should be moved to a secure vault.
